## Security Checklist (Australian Government ISM)

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed to source
- [ ] Input validation is present for all user-supplied data
- [ ] Error messages do not expose sensitive internal details
- [ ] Sensitive data is not logged
- [ ] New dependencies checked against known vulnerability databases
- [ ] Changes comply with relevant ISM controls
